## Delivery workflow labels
- Start: `ai:ready-for-implementation`
- In progress: replace with `ai:implementing`
- During agent self-checks: add `ai:self-validating`
- Ready for QA: replace with `ai:ready-for-verification`
- Verified: replace with `ai:verified`
- Ready to merge: add `ai:ready-to-merge`

## Risk and escalation
- [ ] Set exactly one `risk:*` label.
- [ ] Add `ai:blocked` if progress stalls.
- [ ] Add `ai:needs-human-decision` for unresolved business decisions.
